toolbox_labels.响应数据（放在请求回调中）: Response data (put in the request callback)

async_http_create.tooltip: Create an asynchronous HTTP client object and initialize it, and update() will be automatically called in the loop.

async_http_set_header.message0: %1 sets the default request header %2 value %3
async_http_set_header.tooltip: Set default request headers that apply to all requests

async_http_clear_headers.tooltip: Clear all default request headers that have been set

async_http_get.tooltip: Send an asynchronous GET request and execute the callback code after receiving the response (non-blocking)

async_http_post_json.message0: %1 Send POST JSON request URL %2 JSON content %3
async_http_post_json.tooltip: Send an asynchronous POST request with JSON data (Content-Type: application/json)

async_http_post.message0: %1 Send POST request URL %2 Content %3 Type %4
async_http_post.tooltip: Send an asynchronous POST request and specify the content type

async_http_put_json.message0: %1 Send PUT JSON request URL %2 JSON content %3
async_http_put_json.tooltip: Send an asynchronous PUT request with JSON data (Content-Type: application/json)

async_http_del.tooltip: Send an asynchronous DELETE request and execute the callback code after receiving the response

async_http_on_error.tooltip: The callback code is executed when an error occurs in the HTTP request (error code and error message block can be used in the callback)

async_http_response_status.tooltip: Get the HTTP response status code (such as 200, 404, etc.), only used in request callbacks

async_http_response_body.tooltip: Get the body content of the HTTP response, only used in request callbacks

async_http_response_is_success.tooltip: Determine whether the HTTP response is successful (status code 200-299), only used in request callbacks

async_http_response_header.message0: The value of HTTP response header %1
async_http_response_header.tooltip: Gets the value of the specified HTTP response header, only used in request callbacks

async_http_error_code.tooltip: Get the HTTP error code, only used in error callbacks

async_http_error_message.tooltip: Get the HTTP error message text, only used in error callbacks

async_http_pending.tooltip: Get the number of asynchronous requests currently being processed

async_http_abort_all.tooltip: Cancel all ongoing asynchronous HTTP requests
